data.title: TORM Increases Share Capital Amid Incentive Program
data.description:
Torm ( (TRMD) ) has issued an announcement.

On March 21, 2025, TORM plc announced an increase in its share capital by 262,294 Class A common shares, following the exercise of Restricted Stock Units. This capital increase, part of TORM’s incentive program, was executed without pre-emption rights for existing shareholders and is expected to enhance TORM’s market presence as the new shares will soon be listed on Nasdaq Copenhagen.

More about Torm

TORM is a leading global carrier of refined oil products, operating a fleet of product tanker vessels with a strong focus on safety, environmental responsibility, and customer service. Founded in 1889, TORM conducts business worldwide and is listed on Nasdaq in Copenhagen and New York.

data.title: Discovery Lithium Unveils Promising Exploration Results in James Bay Region
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from ISM Resources Corp ( (TSE:DCLI) ).

Discovery Lithium Inc. announced the results of its 2024 Fall exploration program in the Eeyou Istchee James Bay region, highlighting the identification of LCT pegmatite geochemical signatures on the Bruce Lake and Cirrus East properties. The findings include favorable K/Rb ratios and tantalum values, marking a significant milestone for the company’s exploration efforts. Additionally, the Mantle Property showed potential for orogenic gold and volcanogenic massive sulfide mineralization, with promising gold, bismuth, and zinc values. These results enhance Discovery Lithium’s prospects for lithium mineralization and strengthen its position in the regional exploration landscape.

More about ISM Resources Corp

Discovery Lithium Inc. is a Canadian exploration company focused on advancing domestic energy independence through the discovery of lithium resources. The company operates primarily in the Eeyou Istchee James Bay region, targeting properties with potential for lithium-cesium-tantalum (LCT) pegmatites.

Average Trading Volume: 73,974

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

For detailed information about DCLI stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Entourage Health Corp. Shareholders Approve Going-Private Transaction
data.description:
Entourage Health Corp ( (TSE:ENTG) ) has provided an announcement.

Entourage Health Corp. has announced that its shareholders have approved a going-private transaction, where 1001095275 Ontario Inc., a related party of LiUNA Pension Fund, will acquire all outstanding common shares for $0.005 each. The transaction, which received overwhelming shareholder support, is expected to be finalized by March 31, 2025, pending court approval and other conditions. Post-completion, Entourage’s shares will be delisted from the TSX Venture Exchange, and the company will apply to cease being a reporting issuer under Canadian securities laws.

More about Entourage Health Corp

Entourage Health Corp. is a publicly traded company involved in the production and distribution of cannabis products for both medical and adult-use markets. The company operates a licensed processing facility in Aylmer, Ontario, and has a diverse product portfolio including brands like Starseed Medicinal, Color Cannabis, and Mary’s Medicinals. Entourage has a strategic partnership with LiUNA, the largest construction union in Canada, enhancing its distribution strategy.

Average Trading Volume: 80,649

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: C$1.54M

For an in-depth examination of ENTG stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Above Food Ingredients Restructures for Strategic Growth
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Above Food Ingredients ( (ABVE) ).

On March 20, 2025, Above Food Ingredients Inc. announced the restructuring of its operations by consenting to the winding up of its Purely Canada Food Corp. subsidiaries, which were placed into receivership by the Court of King’s Bench in Saskatchewan. This strategic move is part of the company’s broader plan to focus on higher-margin specialty ingredient businesses and global market opportunities. The restructuring is expected to eliminate significant annual net losses and contribute to pre-tax profitability. Additionally, the intended acquisition of Palm Global Technologies Inc. is anticipated to enhance the company’s revenue and enable regenerative agricultural initiatives, supporting farmers globally.

More about Above Food Ingredients

Above Food Ingredients Inc. is a company focused on delivering nutritious and flavorful ingredients with transparency. It operates in the agriculture and food industry, leveraging AI-driven genomics and agronomy for seed development and maintaining a robust chain of custody in plant proteins. The company’s mission is to create a healthier world through sustainable and traceable food solutions.

YTD Price Performance: -24.66%

Average Trading Volume: 375,055

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: $12.55M

data.title: Community West Bancshares Appoints New Chief Credit Officer
data.description:
Community West Bancshares ( (CWBC) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On March 17, 2025, Community West Bank appointed Hinson M. Thomas as Executive Vice President and Chief Credit Officer. With over 30 years of experience in credit risk management and commercial banking, Thomas will oversee the bank’s Credit Administration Division and manage company-wide credit quality. His appointment is expected to drive strategic growth and enhance the bank’s operations, aligning with its commitment to deliver outstanding results for stakeholders.

More about Community West Bancshares

Community West Bancshares, headquartered in Fresno, California, operates through its wholly owned subsidiary, Community West Bank. Established in 1979, the company focuses on providing comprehensive financial services, including commercial lending, agribusiness, SBA, residential construction and mortgage, manufactured housing, private banking, and cash management. The bank serves Central California with full-service banking centers.

data.title: Big Red Mining Corp. Rebrands to Antimony Resources Corp.
data.description:
An update from Big Red Mining Corp ( (TSE:RED) ) is now available.

Big Red Mining Corp. is changing its name to Antimony Resources Corp. effective March 26, 2025, with its shares trading under the new symbol ‘ATMY’. This rebranding reflects the company’s strategic focus on antimony exploration, as it holds significant projects in New Brunswick. The name change does not affect the company’s share capital or require any action from shareholders, indicating a seamless transition. The move positions the company to strengthen its market presence in the antimony sector, potentially impacting its operations and stakeholder interests positively.

More about Big Red Mining Corp

Big Red Mining Corp., soon to be known as Antimony Resources Corp., is involved in the mining industry with a focus on antimony exploration. The company holds options to acquire full interest in two antimony projects in New Brunswick, namely Bald Hill and Antimony 2.0, highlighting its commitment to expanding antimony exploration. The management team has extensive experience in financing, exploration, development, and mining.

data.title: Yoshiharu Global Co. Appoints Sungjoon Chae to Board
data.description:
Yoshiharu Global Co. Class A ( (YOSH) ) has issued an update.

On March 20, 2025, Yoshiharu Global Co. announced the appointment of Sungjoon Chae to its Board of Directors, effective March 17, 2025. Mr. Chae, a distinguished architect and urban designer, is expected to bring his extensive experience in sustainable and innovative design to support Yoshiharu’s expansion efforts. His appointment reflects the company’s strategic focus on enhancing its operational and design capabilities to drive growth and expand its footprint.

More about Yoshiharu Global Co. Class A

Yoshiharu Global Co. is a fast-growing restaurant operator specializing in authentic Japanese ramen and rolls. Established in 2016, the company quickly gained recognition as a leading ramen restaurant in Southern California and has expanded its operations to include 15 locations across Southern California and Las Vegas.

data.title: Ryanair Announces Share Grants to Non-Executive Directors
data.description:
Ryanair Holdings ( (RYAAY) ) has issued an update.

On March 21, 2025, Ryanair Holdings Plc reported transactions involving its Non-Executive Directors under the Market Abuse Regulation. Directors Anne Nolan, Amber Rudd, Bertrand Grabowski, and Eamonn Brennan were granted rights to receive shares in three years, as part of the company’s 2019 Long Term Incentive Plan. This move reflects Ryanair’s strategy to align management interests with company performance, potentially impacting shareholder value and executive motivation.

More about Ryanair Holdings

Ryanair Holdings Plc is a prominent airline company based in Dublin, Ireland, known for its low-cost air travel services across Europe. The company focuses on providing affordable flight options and operates a large fleet serving numerous destinations, making it a significant player in the European aviation market.

data.title: GFG Resources Expands Pen Gold Project and Updates Corporate Strategy
data.description:
GFG Resources ( (TSE:GFG) ) has provided an update.

GFG Resources Inc. has acquired strategic claims within its Pen Gold Project, located west of Timmins, Ontario, for a total purchase price of C$4,500, securing 100% ownership. Additionally, the company has granted stock options to its directors and officers, allowing them to purchase up to 3,812,000 common shares, and plans to issue 111,111 common shares to the Apitipi Anicinapek Nation as part of a recent exploration agreement, pending TSX Venture Exchange approval. These strategic moves are expected to bolster GFG’s exploration capabilities and strengthen its position in the gold mining industry.

More about GFG Resources

GFG Resources Inc. is a North American precious metals exploration company focused on district-scale gold projects in tier one mining jurisdictions. The company operates three gold projects in the prolific gold district of Timmins, Ontario, Canada, which have similar geological settings to the Timmins Gold Camp, known for producing over 70 million ounces of gold.

data.title: German American Bancorp Launches 2025 Management Incentive Plan
data.description:
German American Bancorp ( (GABC) ) has issued an announcement.

On March 19, 2025, German American Bancorp implemented balanced scorecards under its 2025 Management Incentive Plan for its executive officers. These scorecards are designed to align executive compensation with corporate and individual performance goals, offering both short-term and long-term incentive awards based on achieving specific financial and operational targets. The plan aims to motivate executives by tying their compensation to the company’s performance, with potential awards contingent on meeting or exceeding set benchmarks. This initiative reflects the company’s strategy to drive growth and maintain competitive positioning in the banking sector.

More about German American Bancorp

German American Bancorp is a financial institution operating in the banking industry, providing a range of banking services and products. The company focuses on delivering financial solutions to its customers and stakeholders, with a market emphasis on maintaining strong corporate performance and shareholder value.
